The **Kikuka-shō** (菊花賞; pronounced *Kikka-shō*) is a [Grade 1](/wiki/Conditions_races "Conditions races") [flat](/wiki/Flat_racing "Flat racing") [horse race](/wiki/Horse_racing "Horse racing") in [Japan](/wiki/Japan "Japan") for three-year-old [thoroughbred](/wiki/Thoroughbred "Thoroughbred") [colts](/wiki/Colt_(horse) "Colt (horse)") and [fillies](/wiki/Filly "Filly"). It is run over a distance of 3,000 metres (approximately 1+7⁄8 miles) at the [Kyoto Racecourse](/wiki/Kyoto_Racecourse "Kyoto Racecourse"), [Fushimi-ku, Kyoto](/wiki/Fushimi-ku,_Kyoto "Fushimi-ku, Kyoto"), [Kyoto Prefecture](/wiki/Kyoto_Prefecture "Kyoto Prefecture") in October.

It was first run in 1938 and is the Japanese equivalent of the English [St. Leger Stakes](/wiki/St._Leger_Stakes "St. Leger Stakes").
